scenarios.prompt: Make a publication-quality scatter plot of weight vs mpg colored by cylinders, with a colorblind-safe palette and a clean theme.
scenarios.expected_output: ggplot2 with aes, geom_point, a colorblind-safe scale (viridis/ggsci/Okabe-Ito), refined theme
expectations: Builds the plot with ggplot2 (ggplot() + geom_point())
Uses a colorblind-safe colour scale (e.g. viridis, ggsci, or Okabe-Ito)
Applies a clean theme and readable axis/legend labels

scenarios.prompt: Compose a two-panel figure: a volcano plot on the left and a boxplot on the right, sharing one caption.
scenarios.expected_output: two ggplot objects combined with patchwork, annotated as a single figure
expectations: Creates each panel as a ggplot object
Combines them with patchwork (e.g. p1 + p2 with plot_layout)
Adds a shared caption/annotation via patchwork (plot_annotation)

scenarios.prompt: Plot a Kaplan-Meier survival curve with a risk table under it for exploratory purposes.
scenarios.expected_output: ggsurvfit::survfit2 |> ggsurvfit() with add_risktable(), treated as a figure (not a regulatory deliverable)
expectations: Uses ggsurvfit (survfit2 |> ggsurvfit()) rather than survminer
Treats it as an exploratory figure, not a regulatory TLF

trigger_set.query: make a faceted ggplot with a colorblind palette and patchwork composition
draw a volcano plot and a forest plot for my figure
style this reactable table with conditional formatting
build a Shiny dashboard with interactive plots and filters
produce the regulatory Kaplan-Meier TLF for the ADaM ADTTE dataset
